entries.title: ESM Modules in Node.js
entries.content: This project uses ES modules with 'type': 'module' in package.json, enabling import/export syntax natively in Node.js without transpilation.

entries.title: ESM Import/Export Syntax
entries.content: The codebase uses native ES module import/export syntax throughout, enabled by "type": "module" in package.json. This avoids CommonJS require() and allows top-level await.
